zh.St. Gyles Church, South Mimms, Middlesex: 英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Durham於1248年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆時，他的父親William de Durham18歲，母親Sabine16歲。他和Durhan至少有2個女兒。他去世於1315年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年67歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯。

zh-hans.St. Gyles Church, South Mimms, Middlesex: 英国米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Durham于1248年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆时，他的父亲William de Durham18岁，母亲Sabine16岁。他和Durhan至少有2个女儿。他去世于1315年在英国英格兰倫敦享年67岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可素斯 米姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Durham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the city of Durham, recorded as Dunholm in 1056 and Duram in 1297, named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ (see Down 1) + late Old English holm (from Old Norse holmr ‘island’).

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Derham
meanings: English: habitational name from Dearham in Cumbria, East and West Dereham in Norfolk, or Dyrham in Gloucestershire, named from Old English dēor ‘deer’ + hām ‘settlement, homestead’, or hamm ‘enclosed land, water meadow’.
Irish (mainly Dublin, Drogheda, and Cork): of English origin, but MacLysaght takes this to be a variant of   Durham  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Durham was born in 1248, in Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Durham, was 18 and his mother, Sabine, was 16. He had at least 2 daughters with Durhan. He died in 1315, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in South Mymms, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Durham est né en 1248, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Durham, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Sabine, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Durhan. Il est décédé en 1315, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à South Mymms, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Durham 1248 in Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Durham 18 und seine Mutter Sabine 16. Er hatte mit Durhan mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1315 im Alter von 67 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in South Mymms, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Durham è nato il nel 1248 nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Durham, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Sabine, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Durhan. Morì nel 1315, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a South Mymms, Middlesex, England.

ja.St. Gyles Church, South Mimms, Middlesex: イギリスミッドレセックスソウス ムインムズ
ja.lifeSummary: John de Durhamが1248年にイギリスイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父William de Durhamは18歳，母Sabineは16歳であった。彼はDurhanとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1315年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで67歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスソウス ムインムズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Durham(이)가 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Durham(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Sabine(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Durhan(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 소우스 마이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Durham nasceu em 1248, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Durham, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Sabine, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Durhan. Ele faleceu em 1315, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em South Mymms, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Durham родился в 1248 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Durham было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Sabine, 16. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Durhan. Он умер в 1315 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности соут миммс, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Durham nació en 1248, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Durham, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Sabine, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Durhan. Murió en 1315, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en South Mymms, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
